notes:
The game runs but keys don't work, so it's impossible to drive the train, turn the headlights on or even switch the battery. Also using the mouse to switch buttons on the dashboard doesn't work at all making selection of a route impossible.
Won't run without DXVK.
Disabling ESync slightly changes things in a way that the player can select a route but that's it - the train remains undriveable.
title: Metro Simulator 2019
